artPrompt: A hulking construct of rusted iron and dead lightbulbs lurches upright over the carnival entrance, a face of cracked glass and tangled filament limbs, half its bulbs glowing sickly hot-gold while the others gape dark and broken. Tattered striped tents and ember sparks haze the smoky black night behind. Imposing low film-still angle of a creaking animate sign at epic scale, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: The Living Marquee
text:
Defender
Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, the marquee flashes — read this card's name aloud in your best carnival-barker voice. If you do, draw a card. If you mumble it, the bulbs flicker out and you get nothing. The table judges sincerity.
flavorText: Half the bulbs are dead. The half that work spell something rude after midnight.

extras.fourthWall: read the card name aloud as a barker to draw
